text: Smart City: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Investment: ₹7,118 crore. Focus: Solar city, heritage conservation, lake restoration, e-governance. ICCC (Integrated Command and Control Centre) operational. Ranked among top smart cities.

Smart City: Pune, Maharashtra. Investment: ₹5,500 crore. Focus: IT integration, Mula-Mutha river rejuvenation, smart mobility, EV charging infra. Open data platform. Smart parking and traffic management.

Smart City: Surat, Gujarat. Investment: ₹5,100 crore. Focus: Diamond/textile industry digitization, CCTV surveillance (17,000+ cameras), water management, solar rooftops. One of India's cleanest cities.
Smart City: Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Investment: ₹5,400 crore. Focus: Sabarmati Riverfront development, BRTS transit, heritage city (UNESCO), slum rehabilitation. GIFT City nearby for fintech.

Smart City: Indore, Madhya Pradesh. Investment: ₹4,800 crore. India's cleanest city (7 consecutive times, Swachh Survekshan). 100% door-to-door waste collection. Bio-CNG from waste. Smart bus, e-governance.

Smart City Mission: Overview. Launched June 2015 for 100 cities. ₹2 lakh crore investment (center + state + PPP). 8,000+ projects, 5,700+ completed. ICCCs in 95 cities. Focus: e-governance, smart mobility, water, energy, waste. Extended to March 2025.
